About Me

Designing with intention

I'm Shawan — a graphic designer and BBA student majoring in Management Information Systems at the University of Dhaka. I blend strategic thinking with a passion for visual storytelling to craft designs that are both beautiful and purposeful.

My work spans brand identity, social media content, print design, and event graphics — most notably for the Dhaka University MIS Club where I serve as Development Wing Manager.

I believe great design is invisible — it simply makes people feel exactly the right thing at exactly the right moment.

Selected Work

Recent Projects

Tech Manya — Brand Identity

Logo · Brand Cover · Visual Identity 2024

Complete brand identity for a tech business — from the geometric monogram logo to the full social media cover, built around a bold tech-forward aesthetic.

Craftful Curios — Brand Design

Logo · Banner · Brand Identity 2024

Playful and colourful brand identity for a craft activities page — a handprint logo paired with a whimsical banner that captures the joy of creativity.

The MIS Nexus — Magazine Cover

Publication · Print · Editorial 2024

Cover design for "The MIS Nexus: Trailblazers' Journey" — a university publication covering AI, Big Data, and Quantum Computing, published by MIS-18 batch.

DU MIS Club — Event & Social Graphics

Event Design · Social Media · Poster 2024–2025

A series of official graphics for Dhaka University MIS Club — including the 21st Anniversary banner, Ramadhan Kareem, and Eid Mubarak posters.
